name: Reactan, Dragon Ruler of Pebbles
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>地</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ち</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>征</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－リアクタン
desc: You can discard this card and 1 Dragon or EARTH monster; Special Summon 1 "Redox, Dragon Ruler of Boulders" from your Deck, but it cannot attack this turn. You can only use this effect of "Reactan, Dragon Ruler of Pebbles" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can discard this card and 1 Dragon or EARTH monster; Special Summon 1 "Redox, Dragon Ruler of Boulders" from your Deck, but it cannot attack this turn. You can only use this effect of "Reactan, Dragon Ruler of Pebbles" once per turn.
